sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a standard leadership change with neutral immediate impact until performance is proven.

headlines.headline: Halvix Holdings announces $1.2B share buyback program

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
